reviewer: agent matrix pass (real-inference + light/dark screenshots read, revision 2)

rubric.evidence: REAL browser run (own headless Chrome, WASM, no-GPU): first visit showed download-required + Download button; after download the loader reached ready and a real forward pass on sample face A returned expected age ≈ 31 yrs (most likely 30-39 · 55%). conformance: loads-clean=pass, calls-real-inference=pass. screenshots: reports/verify/age-estimation-light.png, reports/verify/age-estimation-darktheme.png
rubric.notes: Real ONNX inference confirmed (jdp8/vit-age-classifier q8) — not a canned result.

rubric.evidence: Output is a softmax over the 9 declared age buckets (0-2 … 70+) that sums to 100%, folded into a probability-weighted expected-age number — semantically the correct image-classification shape. Verified live: sample A → 30-39 dominant, expected ≈ 31 yrs. See-inside table shows per-bucket logit + softmax. screenshots: reports/verify/age-estimation-light.png

conformance: declares-model-id=pass (jdp8/vit-age-classifier linked), declares-task=pass (image-classification), declares-backend=pass (WASM), declares-quantisation=pass (q8), inference-off-main-thread=pass (Web Worker). At-a-glance matches the model actually loaded.

shared-auto-init-loader=pass. REAL cached-reload test: after first download, reloading auto-initialised to ready with NO Download button (reloadState=ready, reloadHasDownload=false) — the shared createModelLoader auto-init contract holds. screenshots: reports/verify/age-estimation-light-reload.png

conformance: live-status-region=pass (role=status aria-live), errors-on-the-page=pass. Fresh visit surfaced download-required with a labelled Download button; camera path degrades honestly when getUserMedia is unavailable; no WebGPU required (WASM). screenshots: reports/verify/age-estimation-light.png
rubric.notes: Offline/eviction paths handled by the shared loader (partial→Re-download); not separately forced here.

rubric.evidence: Every control operable: camera toggle, capture, sample thumbnails (click + Enter/Space keyboard handlers, role=button), drag/drop upload, and Estimate button. buttons-have-names=pass. Verified via real run (Estimate produced output). screenshots: reports/verify/age-estimation-light.png
Output is produced by a real on-device forward pass (logits → softmax computed in the worker); confirmed by the live ≈ 31 yrs result varying with input. No hardcoded/canned result anywhere.

conformance: images-have-alt=pass, buttons-have-names=pass. Age bars are role=meter with aria-valuenow; status is role=status aria-live; samples/dropzone keyboard-operable. Applied modern-web-guidance 'accessibility'.

responsive-check: desktop clean · mobile clean (no horizontal overflow, no console/network errors, both classes). Screenshots read at 1280 (verify) — stage grid wraps, bars/tables legible, controls stack. Applied 'css-layout' (flex 1 1 260px, logical props, aspect-ratio). screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/age-estimation/desktop.png, reports/responsive/screens/age-estimation/mobile.png

Inference runs off the main thread in a Web Worker (inference-off-main-thread=pass), so the control UI and camera preview stay responsive; the wild page throttles webcam reads (~1.5/s). Applied 'break-up-long-tasks'.

guidanceConsulted.query: responsive control panel grid without horizontal overflow mobile desktop
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Flexbox with flex:1 1 <basis>, intrinsic sizing, logical properties, and aspect-ratio before fixed widths; wrap to avoid narrow-viewport overflow.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — .stage-grid uses flex-wrap with flex:1 1 260px columns, min-inline-size:0, aspect-ratio:1/1 media, and logical inline-size throughout; responsive matrix desktop+mobile clean.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: responsive-check: desktop clean · mobile clean (no horizontal overflow)

guidanceConsulted.query: accessible loading progress status live region
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Announce load/progress/ready/error in an accessible live region; label every control; keep keyboard operability + visible focus; use real meter/role semantics.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — role=status aria-live status lines, labelled buttons, role=meter age bars with aria-valuenow, keyboard handlers (Enter/Space) on sample thumbnails and dropzone.

guidanceConsulted.query: capture webcam camera frame to canvas getUserMedia
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Capture live media frames using built-in canvas drawImage + toDataURL/toBlob rather than heavy DOM-to-image libraries.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — the Webcam helper draws the current <video> frame to a <canvas> and reads it via toDataURL (square, centre-cropped); no library, and the frame is never uploaded.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: models/age-estimation/age.js Webcam.grab(); real run classifies captured/sample frames

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Break up long main-thread tasks / yield so inference doesn't spike INP.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — all inference runs off the main thread via a Web Worker; the live 'age over frames' loop throttles webcam reads so the main thread stays free.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Use cross-document view transitions for catalogue↔page navigation.

openQuestions: How much does accuracy vary across skin tone / lighting in practice? (Documented as a bias caveat on the page; not benchmarked here.)
Would a face-crop-first default (multi-model) improve stability enough to make it the primary path?

followUpGoals.goal: Add a temporal-smoothing option to the wild 'age over frames' page (rolling mean) to demonstrate how averaging tames single-frame wobble.

summary: Revision-2 agent matrix pass for age-estimation (image-classification, jdp8/vit-age-classifier, WASM q8). Real in-browser inference confirmed (sample face → expected ≈ 31 yrs, correct 9-bucket softmax shape); cached reload auto-inits with no Load button; console clean; light+dark screenshots read; desktop+mobile responsive clean. Framed honestly as an imperfect, biased apparent-age signal — never identity/verification. Support flipped to ok on both classes.
